highlights.headline: Utah Jazz vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Utah Jazz vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Utah Jazz vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/13 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Keyonte George scored 32 points, Lauri Markkanen added 28 and the Utah Jazz bounced back after a 55-point loss and defeated the Cleveland Cavaliers 123-112 Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jazz bounce back after a 55-point loss and beat Cavaliers 123-112

video.headline: Utah Jazz vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Utah Jazz vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/13 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Boston Celtics vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Boston Celtics vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Boston Celtics vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/13 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Pascal Siakam scored 21 points, including the decisive 7-foot bank shot with 6.1 seconds remaining, and the Indiana Pacers won three straight games for the first time this season, beating the Boston Celtics 98-96 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pascal Siakam and Pacers nip Celtics 98-96 for 1st 3-game win streak of season

video.headline: Boston Celtics vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Boston Celtics vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/13 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Tyrese Maxey scored 33 points, Joel Embiid had 27 and the Philadelphia 76ers used an 80-point first half to beat the Toronto Raptors 115-102 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Maxey scores 33 as 76ers use 80-point first half to beat Raptors 115-102

video.headline: Philadelphia 76ers vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Philadelphia 76ers vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights) 2026/01/13 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Brooklyn Nets vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Brooklyn Nets vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brooklyn Nets vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights) 2026/01/13 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Cooper Flagg scored 27 points and matched a season high with three steals, and Naji Marshall had three straight baskets down the stretch and finished with 22 points as the depleted Dallas Mavericks beat the Brooklyn Nets 113-105 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Flagg posts 27 points, 3 steals to help Mavericks beat the Nets 113-105

video.headline: Brooklyn Nets vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brooklyn Nets vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights) 2026/01/13 ESHEET

events.name: Los Angeles Lakers at Sacramento Kings

highlights.headline: Los Angeles Lakers vs. Sacramento Kings: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Los Angeles Lakers vs. Sacramento Kings: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Los Angeles Lakers vs. Sacramento Kings: Game Highlights) 2026/01/13 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Malik Monk made seven 3-pointers and scored 26 points to help the Sacramento Kings to a 124-112 win over the Los Angeles Lakers on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Monk hits 7 3-pointers, scores 26 points as Kings top Lakers 124-112; Doncic scores 42 in loss

video.headline: Los Angeles Lakers vs. Sacramento Kings: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Los Angeles Lakers vs. Sacramento Kings: Game Highlights) 2026/01/13 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Charlotte Hornets vs. LA Clippers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Charlotte Hornets vs. LA Clippers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Charlotte Hornets vs. LA Clippers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/13 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Kawhi Leonard scored 35 points and James Harden had 32 to move into ninth place on the NBA's career scoring list, and the Los Angeles Clippers beat the Charlotte Hornets 117-109 on Monday night for their fourth win in five games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leonard scores 35, Harden moves to 9th place on NBA's scoring list as Clippers beat Hornets 117-109

video.headline: Charlotte Hornets vs. LA Clippers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Charlotte Hornets vs. LA Clippers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/13 ESHEET
